data.body:
PASS 1 (coaching) — T8 LLM/prompt structural-completeness probe: CLEAN, no findings.

This chunk is an editor rendering/round-trip task over constructs that are ALREADY fully specified in the codebase; it does not author a new prompt/agent/enum/output-schema system, so T8's structural-gap probe finds nothing actionable. Tool-verified:

- The `batch` step + `criterion` schema (`prompt` / `when` / `with`), `usd_budget`, and `model_ladder` are all defined with value vocabularies and descriptions in `src/rebar/schemas/workflow.v3.schema.json:266-314` — no referenced schema/enum has an undefined vocabulary.
- The overlay decision rule is co-located with the schema that needs it: the criterion `when` predicate is defined as "Same skip-on-falsy semantics as a step's `if:`, scoped to one criterion" (`workflow.v3.schema.json:276-279`), and the `if:` overlay mechanism is fully specified in `docs/workflow-authoring-v2.md` §2.1 (`overlay_triggers` precompute + `${{…}}` guard).
- No ambiguous counter/state placement: the reference `DefaultBatchRunner` explicitly RECORDS-but-does-not-enforce `usd_budget`/`model_ladder`/shedding, with epic B owning enforcement (`src/rebar/llm/workflow/executor.py:388-409`) — placement is unambiguous and documented.
- Fallbacks for failed sub-steps are specified: un-mappable edits are rejected on Save with located errors (file untouched) and Save is fail-closed on validation errors/unavailable (`docs/workflow-editor.md`).
- No instruction-locality / pink-elephant antipattern; the referenced executor/runner/schema/test (`tests/unit/workflow/test_batch_step.py`) all exist and are fully specified.

Affirmations (T8 checklist all pass): no undefined-but-referenced enum/protocol; decision rule co-located with its schema; no ambiguous counter placement; sub-step fallback specified; referenced constructs exist and are fully specified (tool-verified).
